pi.name: Dr. Jason S. Lucas
pi.title: Assistant Professor, CU Boulder
pi.bio: Dr. Jason Lucas leads the Secure and Ethical AI Lab. His research spans multilingual NLP across 79 languages, information integrity, and socio-technical AI safety — with published work in ACL, EMNLP, NAACL, KDD, and ICML.

students.name: Open — PhD Position
students.bio: We are actively recruiting PhD students interested in multilingual NLP, AI safety, or algorithmic fairness. See Join Us.
